title: hieracium squalidum grex pseudohumile
intro: Hieracium squalidum grex pseudohumile, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating various skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Hieracium squalidum grex pseudohumile can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
